name: frSetExtOffsetRateControl
title: frSetExtOffsetRateControl
syntax: int frSetExtOffsetRateControl(int aChannel, int aRateCtrl, int anOffsetCtrl);
description: Applies the external rate and offset correction values from the FlexRay parameters for the next cycle. For a description and explanation of the external clock correction procedure please refer to the FlexRay specification and/or to the user manual for the E-Ray communication controller.
The function is used in the following sample configuration:
2 Cluster Gateway – FlexRay_2Cluster_Gateway.cfgDemonstrates a FlexRay-FlexRay gateway with manipulation of the routed data and the (optional) synchronization of both FlexRay clusters.

parameters.name: aRateCtrl
parameters.description: Controls whether the rate correction value is to be added, subtracted or ignored: 1: add value -1: substract value 0: ignore value The value referenced is clusterCfg.pExternRateCorrection, which can be read/set by the functions frGetConfiguration and frSetConfiguration.

parameters.name: anOffsetCtrl
parameters.description: Controls whether the offset correction value is to be added, subtracted or ignored: 1: add value; -1: substract value; 0: ignore value; The value referenced is clusterCfg.pExternOffsetCorrection, which can be read/set by functions FRGetConfiguration and FRSetConfiguration.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
